notes: Timed play arrives, plus a big Solo/Sandbox toolkit and a full counter-step redesign. NEW Blitz timed mode: chess-style personal clocks with +5s at end of turn, a Custom option to set each player's clock, per-turn increment and response limits, a prominent clock HUD, and a Ranked match-clock with overtime. NEW Sandbox mode: a free-form testing board to spawn/edit any card in any zone, undo/redo, save/load board snapshots, grant keywords, and a deck-builder-style card picker with search, colour filters and hover preview. NEW Restore Code: export a position from a replay and play it out yourself (in the Custom Room or Sandbox). Counter step redesigned: pick counters right in the actions panel from a card grid, see the attacker-vs-defender matchup with mini card art and a clear safe/danger read-out, hover to float the card up in your hand, and Resolve Attack in one step (no more extra window). Counter events are gated by your available DON. Polish: card power/cost/status badges restyled as sleek pills, summoning-sick cards read as a subtle grey, multiplayer shows player names instead of North/South, the win/lose screen is always reachable after View Board, a Patch Notes tab on the main menu, and a menu reorder.
